content.text:
All tests pass. The vertical-to-horizontal blinker test passes without any code changes because the generalized B3/S23 implementation from the previous Green phase already handles this case correctly.

Green Phase Complete:
- **Implementation**: No change needed — existing generalized B3/S23 implementation handles the blinker oscillation
- **Result**: All 5 active tests pass (3 todo remaining)
- **Approach**: This is the minimal implementation — the previous Green phase already required the general B3/S23 rule to handle the 2x2 block (4 survivors) and underpopulation cases. The blinker test is a natural consequence of that generalization. Adding code specifically for blinkers would be over-implementation.
